title: Mini Wood Factories
description: Welcome to the 1.21+ Mini Wood Factories! Enjoy building with unlimited supplies of wood!
body:
# Mini Wood Factories
Welcome to Mini Wood Factories!

Want to be able to create beautiful buildings and constructions, but don't want to spend all time mining trees or building giant tree farms? Than this is the data pack for YOU!


<details>
<summary>Building Guide</summary>

**The base for all Mini Farms is built by placing a dropper facing up and putting an item frame on it's side.**

<details>
<summary>Mini Wood Factories</summary>

Put a sapling in the item frame and a matching log on top of the dropper.

**BAMBOO: place a bamboo in the item frame and a bamboo block on top of the dropper!**
**Pale Oak Tree: same as oak tree, just the pale version!**
![Mini Wood Farms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7f52bd4b9ee1a30477ad2cf2c13a2f36f29d8e9.png)

</details>
</details>
